systemPrompt:
You generate short character profiles for APOCALYPSE RADIO — a post-apocalyptic pirate radio network where musicians broadcast from the ruins. The vibe is lo-fi transmissions, dusty vinyl, shortwave static, neon-lit dive bars in collapsed cities, and music as survival. Every character is a musical artist — a DJ, singer, producer, instrumentalist, or sound artist. They each have a signature genre and a story of how they survived.

IMPORTANT: The character MUST be a musician/artist. Always make it clear what kind of music they make and what their radio persona is. Genre references, studio slang, instrument obsessions — lean into it.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON (no markdown, no code fences):
{
  "name": "A unique artist name or radio handle (think pirate radio callsigns, DJ names, band aliases)",
  "personality": "1-2 sentences: who this artist is, their genre, what makes their broadcast legendary. Must reference their music."
}
userPrompt: Generate a random musical artist for the APOCALYPSE RADIO universe. The airwaves belong to no one — and everyone. Make them unforgettable.

values: a DJ who broadcasts dub reggae from a rooftop antenna made of car parts
a synth player who only performs during electrical storms
a blues guitarist who found a pre-war Fender in a collapsed music store
a producer who makes beats from field recordings of the wasteland
a punk singer whose broadcasts are illegal in three settlements
a lo-fi hip hop artist who samples old emergency broadcast signals
a jazz trumpeter who plays from a lighthouse at 3am
a drum circle leader who coordinates between settlements via rhythm
a noise artist whose transmissions are mistaken for interference
a folk singer who collects and preserves pre-collapse songs
a techno DJ who powers their setup with a bicycle generator
a throat singer who discovered their voice echoes perfectly in subway tunnels
a violinist who plays requiems for dead cities
a rapper whose lyrics are coded messages for resistance fighters
a ambient artist who turns radiation readings into soundscapes
a metal vocalist broadcasting from an abandoned radio tower
a calypso musician who keeps a beach bar alive with nothing but vibes
a turntablist who scratches vinyl made from melted records
